steps.title: Rewrite using the negative exponent rule
steps.content:
Apply the negative exponent rule: $x^{-1}$ equals the reciprocal of $x$, so:
$$g(x) = 7x^{-1} = 7 \cdot \frac{1}{x} = \frac{7}{x}$$

steps.title: Substitute x equals 8
steps.content:
Plug in $x = 8$:
$$g(8) = \frac{7}{8}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
